metadata.scope: 48 UPSC Preparation Plans – Full Audit & Analysis

old_weaknesses: No exam-cycle alignment (Prelims, Mains, Interview phases absent)
Static revision not tied to spaced repetition
Current affairs generic, not linked to GS syllabus
18-month cap missing the 24-month cycle aspirants need
architecture_review.new_architecture: Foundation → Coverage → Retention → Prelims → Mains → Interview
new_strengths: Exam-cycle aligned phases for all 4 timelines
Answer writing starts month 1 at 1 answer/week
Ethics begins in Foundation phase with thinker database
Current affairs engine with issue-mapping and GS linkage
Full bot-ready JSON structure with task_id, dependencies, AI_hint
Competency model tracking 8 dimensions per subject
Interview preparation module for 12/24 month plans
Complete essay framework with theme bank, quote bank, evaluation

sequencing_review.old_sequencing: History → Geography → Polity → Economy – no phase differentiation
sequencing_review.new_sequencing: Phase-aware topic allocation + level-adjusted depth + hours-adjusted coverage
improvements: Foundation phase: cross-subject overview builds holistic understanding
Coverage phase: systematic GS 1-4 with concurrent optional
Retention phase: spaced repetition before Prelims intensive
Prelims phase: MCQ-heavy with test series integration
Mains phase: answer writing + revision balanced
Interview phase: DAF + mock interviews + personality

workload_analysis.2h_daily: Feasible for working professionals. 3-month plan covers priority 50%, 12-month covers 80%
workload_analysis.4h_daily: Standard aspirant load. Good for full preparation in 12-month plan
workload_analysis.6h_daily: Serious aspirant. Allows depth + revision in 12-month plan
workload_analysis.8h_daily: Full-time aspirant. Enables mastery-level preparation in all timelines
workload_analysis.realistic_expectations: Hours × Consistency > Hours × Intensity. 4h/day × 12 months >> 8h/day × 3 months for most aspirants

gaps_identified_and_fixed.gap: No PYQ integration in old plan
gaps_identified_and_fixed.fix: PYQ_required field in every daily task, PYQ mapping in revision engine
Answer writing engine with month-wise progression from 1/week to 10/week
Issue mapping system, daily CA tagging to GS papers
Resource banks differentiated per level, topic depth adjusted algorithmically
AI architecture includes burnout signals + recovery plan
Essay framework integrated in all 48 plans with scaled targets
Phase-adjusted time splits, realistic topic density

exam_cycle_alignment.Foundation: Builds conceptual base, no exam pressure
exam_cycle_alignment.Coverage: Full syllabus with concurrent CA, ethics, essay, optional
exam_cycle_alignment.Retention: Spaced revision, PYQ mastery, answer writing development
exam_cycle_alignment.Prelims: MCQ intensive, test series, CSAT, CA sprint
exam_cycle_alignment.Mains: Answer writing, essay, optional, GS depth
exam_cycle_alignment.Interview: DAF, mocks, personality, CA for PI

difficulty_alignment.Beginner: NCERTs → Standard books → Current affairs. Slow start, strong finish
difficulty_alignment.Intermediate: Skip NCERT basics, standard books + CA integration from day 1
difficulty_alignment.Advanced: Primary sources, original documents, expert-level answer writing

optional_subject_analysis.time_allocation_rationale: Optional receives 10-25% based on daily hours, increasing with more time available

coverage_by_timeline.3_months: Syllabus overview only – don't start serious optional in 3-month plan
coverage_by_timeline.12_months: Complete + Revision + 50 answer writings + test series
coverage_by_timeline.24_months: Mastery level – 100+ answers, multiple revisions, original integration

essay_framework_analysis.recommendation: Start essay reading from Month 1. Start structured writing from Month 3. Aim for 1-2 essays monthly.

ethics_analysis.key_upgrade: Ethics moved from afterthought to Foundation phase

current_affairs_analysis.key_innovation: Issue-mapping system links CA to GS syllabus topics
current_affairs_analysis.prelims_ca_strategy: CA-PYQ mapping document updated monthly for high-yield current affairs

answer_writing_analysis.quality_framework: Keyword tracking + Self-review checklist + Peer review

interview_preparation_analysis.note: 3-month and 6-month plans have basic interview awareness; full prep in 12/24 month plans

ai_readiness_analysis.notification_system: 4-touchpoint daily: Morning brief, Midday check-in, Evening review, Tomorrow preview

competency_model_analysis.innovation: First UPSC plan to explicitly model 8-dimensional competency per subject

upsc_realism_check.prelims_coverage: All plans cover Prelims syllabus proportionally to time available
upsc_realism_check.mains_coverage: 12 and 24-month plans give full Mains attention
upsc_realism_check.optional_realism: Optional treated realistically – no unrealistic 3-month full-optional claims
upsc_realism_check.time_realism: 2h plans acknowledge lower coverage – no over-promising
upsc_realism_check.note: UPSC CSE has ~0.1% selection rate from all applicants. All probabilities are conditional on completing the plan.
